meta.title: Computer Science Knowledge Map
meta.source: Based on Denning (2005), ACM/IEEE CS2023 Curriculum, and UVT FMI study programs
meta.institution: West University of Timișoara — Faculty of Mathematics & Computer Science
meta.institutionRO: Universitatea de Vest din Timișoara — Facultatea de Matematică și Informatică

nodes.label:
Algorithms &
Data Structures
nodes.taglineRO: Coloana vertebrală matematică a calculului

problems.title: Sorting in linear time
problems.example: Radix sort, counting sort — optimal for restricted (integer) inputs

problems.title: P vs NP
problems.example: Is every problem whose solution is verifiable in polynomial time also solvable in poly time? The central open problem of computer science.

problems.title: Optimal all-pairs shortest paths
problems.example: Can APSP be solved faster than O(n³)? Tight bounds remain unknown.

nodes.uvt: Taught across all bachelor years as Fundamentele Informaticii and Analiza Algoritmilor. Research in combinatorial optimization by FMI faculty.
nodes.uvtRO: Predată în toți anii la Fundamentele Informaticii și Analiza Algoritmilor. Cercetare în optimizare combinatorică la FMI-UVT.

nodes.label:
Theory of
Computation
nodes.tagline: What can and cannot be computed
nodes.taglineRO: Ce poate și ce nu poate fi calculat

problems.title: Halting problem
problems.example: Turing (1936) proved no algorithm can decide if an arbitrary program halts on a given input.

problems.title: Circuit complexity lower bounds
problems.example: Can we prove SAT requires super-polynomial-size circuits? Decades of effort, no resolution.

problems.title: Descriptive complexity
problems.example: Which logics exactly capture P, NL, PSPACE? FO+LFP = P on ordered structures (Immerman-Vardi), but unordered case open.

nodes.uvt: Covered in Limbaje Formale și Automate and Calculabilitate și Complexitate courses at FMI-UVT.
nodes.uvtRO: Acoperit în cursurile Limbaje Formale și Automate și Calculabilitate și Complexitate la FMI-UVT.

nodes.label:
Programming
Languages
nodes.tagline: Design and formal semantics of languages
nodes.taglineRO: Proiectarea și semantica formală a limbajelor

problems.title: Type inference scalability
problems.example: Hindley-Milner inference is EXPTIME in pathological cases; practical type systems trade completeness for speed.

problems.title: Verified compilation
problems.example: CompCert formally verifies a C compiler; extending this to full modern optimizing compilers remains open.

problems.title: Algebraic effects as a unified model
problems.example: Can algebraic effects + handlers cleanly replace monads, exceptions, async/await, and continuations?

nodes.uvt: Courses: Programare Orientată Obiect (Java/C++), Programare Funcțională (Haskell), Semantica Limbajelor de Programare.
nodes.uvtRO: Cursuri: POO (Java/C++), Programare Funcțională (Haskell), Semantica Limbajelor de Programare.

nodes.label:
Operating
Systems
nodes.taglineRO: Gestionarea resurselor și abstractizarea proceselor

problems.title: Schedulability analysis
problems.example: Earliest Deadline First (EDF) is optimal for preemptive uniprocessors — proven by Liu & Layland 1973.

problems.title: OS for heterogeneous hardware
problems.example: Managing GPUs, NPUs, FPGAs, and CPUs with incompatible memory models in a single kernel is unsolved.

problems.title: Full OS formal verification
problems.example: seL4 is formally verified; extending this to a full POSIX-compliant Linux-like kernel remains a grand challenge.

nodes.uvt: Sisteme de Operare course with Linux kernel labs covering process scheduling, memory management, and IPC.
nodes.uvtRO: Curs Sisteme de Operare cu laboratoare pe kernel Linux: planificarea proceselor, gestionarea memoriei, IPC.

nodes.label:
Computer
Architecture
nodes.taglineRO: Interfața hardware-software

problems.title: Memory wall
problems.example: Bandwidth growing slower than compute — addressed (not fully solved) by cache hierarchies and NUMA.

problems.title: Post-Moore scaling
problems.example: Beyond CMOS: optical, neuromorphic, and quantum computing — none yet match silicon at scale.

problems.title: Microarchitectural security
problems.example: Spectre/Meltdown: speculative execution creates side-channel leaks; no complete hardware fix exists.

nodes.uvt: Arhitectura Calculatoarelor course including digital logic labs and assembly programming.
nodes.uvtRO: Curs Arhitectura Calculatoarelor cu laboratoare de logică digitală și programare în asamblare.

nodes.label:
Computer
Networks
nodes.taglineRO: Protocoale pentru comunicare distribuită

problems.title: BGP routing security
problems.example: BGP hijacking attacks persist; RPKI deployment helps but is far from universal.

problems.title: Named data networking (NDN)
problems.example: Can we replace IP host-addressing with content-centric addressing for better caching and security?

problems.title: Zero-trust network architecture
problems.example: No implicit trust zone; every packet verified — implementation at scale is an open engineering problem.

nodes.uvt: Rețele de Calculatoare course with Wireshark, TCP/IP stack labs, and socket programming.
nodes.uvtRO: Curs Rețele de Calculatoare cu laboratoare Wireshark, TCP/IP și programare socket.

nodes.label:
Security &
Cryptography
nodes.taglineRO: Confidențialitate, integritate și disponibilitate

problems.title: Post-quantum migration
problems.example: NIST finalized CRYSTALS-Kyber/Dilithium in 2024; migrating the internet's PKI is a decade-long open engineering effort.

problems.title: LLM-assisted vulnerability discovery
problems.example: AI finds real bugs (e.g., Google Project Zero + GPT-4); false-positive rate and completeness are open.

problems.title: Homomorphic encryption at practical speed
problems.example: FHE allows compute on encrypted data but remains ~10⁶× slower than plaintext computation.

nodes.uvt: Securitatea Sistemelor Informatice course; CTF competitions; cryptography elective track.
nodes.uvtRO: Curs Securitatea Sistemelor Informatice; competiții CTF; pistă opțională de criptografie.

nodes.label: Cryptography
nodes.taglineRO: Fundamente matematice ale securității

problems.title: Random oracle model limitations
problems.example: Many schemes proven secure only in the ROM (not the standard model); gap between models and practice.

problems.title: Quantum-safe zero-knowledge proofs
problems.example: STARKs are plausibly quantum-safe; most SNARKs rely on discrete log — migration path is open.

nodes.uvt: Elective in the Mathematics-Computer Science track; ties to FMI mathematics department.
nodes.uvtRO: Disciplină opțională în traseul Matematică-Informatică; legătură cu departamentul de matematică FMI.

nodes.label:
Databases &
Data Engineering
nodes.tagline: Storing, querying, and managing data at scale
nodes.taglineRO: Stocare, interogare și gestionare a datelor la scară

problems.title: ACID vs. BASE tradeoff
problems.example: CAP theorem (Brewer 2000, proved by Gilbert & Lynch 2002): choose at most 2 of Consistency, Availability, Partition-tolerance.

problems.title: Learned index structures
problems.example: Replacing B-trees with trained models for read workloads is promising; efficient updates remain open.

problems.title: Differential privacy for SQL at scale
problems.example: DP-SQL systems (e.g., PINQ, Tumult Analytics) struggle with complex join queries and tight budgets.

nodes.uvt: Baze de Date I & II courses with PostgreSQL and MongoDB labs; project-based learning with real datasets.
nodes.uvtRO: Cursuri Baze de Date I & II cu laboratoare PostgreSQL și MongoDB; proiecte cu seturi de date reale.

nodes.label:
Artificial
Intelligence
nodes.taglineRO: Raționament, învățare, percepție și acțiune

problems.title: AI alignment & safety
problems.example: How to ensure LLMs and autonomous agents reliably act according to human values at scale? No formal solution.

problems.title: Grounded factual reasoning
problems.example: LLMs hallucinate confidently; combining neural generation with verified knowledge retrieval is unsolved.

problems.title: Sample efficiency
problems.example: Humans learn a concept from ~10 examples; state-of-the-art vision models need millions. The gap is a fundamental open problem.

nodes.uvt: Inteligență Artificială course (year 3 bachelor); ML electives; active research lab at FMI-UVT with EU-funded projects.
nodes.uvtRO: Curs Inteligență Artificială (an 3 licență); opționale ML; laborator de cercetare activ la FMI-UVT cu proiecte UE.

nodes.label:
Machine
Learning
nodes.taglineRO: Învățarea tiparelor din date

problems.title: Generalization of overparameterized models
problems.example: Double descent: models with far more parameters than data generalize well — contradicts classical bias-variance theory.

problems.title: Mechanistic interpretability
problems.example: What circuits in a transformer implement factual recall? Anthropic's work is early; full understanding is far off.

problems.title: Algorithmic fairness and bias
problems.example: Satisfying multiple fairness criteria simultaneously is provably impossible (Chouldechova 2017); tradeoffs are unsolved.

nodes.uvt: Machine Learning course and Deep Learning elective; GPU cluster available for thesis projects at FMI-UVT.
nodes.uvtRO: Curs Machine Learning și Deep Learning opțional; cluster GPU disponibil pentru lucrări de licență/master la FMI.

nodes.label:
Software
Engineering
nodes.tagline: Processes and methods for building software
nodes.taglineRO: Procese și metode pentru construirea software-ului

problems.title: Technical debt quantification
problems.example: No agreed metric for 'how messy is this codebase'; SonarQube approximates but lacks theoretical grounding.

problems.title: AI-assisted development correctness
problems.example: GitHub Copilot generates plausible but buggy/insecure code ~40% of the time; correctness guarantees are open.

problems.title: Formal specs in industrial practice
problems.example: TLA+/Dafny help catch bugs (used at AWS); adoption barriers in standard industry practice remain large.

nodes.uvt: Ingineria Programării and Software Engineering courses with Agile project labs and team-based development.
nodes.uvtRO: Cursuri Ingineria Programării cu laboratoare Agile și proiecte de echipă.

nodes.label:
Human-Computer
Interaction
nodes.tagline: Designing for human use and experience
nodes.taglineRO: Proiectare pentru utilizare umană și experiență

problems.title: Explainable AI for lay users
problems.example: How to communicate model uncertainty and reasoning to non-experts without overwhelming or misleading them?

problems.title: Accessibility automation
problems.example: Auto-generated alt-text, real-time captions, screen-reader AI — quality still far below human experts.

problems.title: Persuasive design ethics
problems.example: Dark patterns and attention economy mechanisms are well-documented but no legal/technical standard stops them.

nodes.uvt: HCI elective course; UX design projects; accessibility research group at FMI-UVT.
nodes.uvtRO: Curs opțional HCI; proiecte UX; grup de cercetare accesibilitate la FMI-UVT.

nodes.label:
Distributed
Systems
nodes.taglineRO: Coordonare în rețele de noduri

problems.title: Consensus in asynchronous networks
problems.example: FLP impossibility (Fischer-Lynch-Paterson 1985): no deterministic consensus in fully async networks with even one failure.

problems.title: Geo-distributed global consistency
problems.example: Google Spanner uses atomic clocks (TrueTime); achieving tight consistency without GPS/atomic clocks is open.

problems.title: BFT at internet scale
problems.example: Byzantine fault-tolerant blockchains achieve either low throughput or weak security — no system achieves both.

nodes.uvt: Sisteme Distribuite course with cloud and Docker/Kubernetes lab exercises at FMI-UVT.
nodes.uvtRO: Curs Sisteme Distribuite cu laboratoare cloud și Docker/Kubernetes la FMI-UVT.

nodes.label:
Cloud &
DevOps
nodes.taglineRO: Infrastructură ca și cod; livrare continuă

problems.title: Multi-cloud portability
problems.example: Vendor lock-in to AWS/Azure/GCP abstractions (Lambda, BigQuery, etc.) — no neutral portability standard.

problems.title: FinOps cost prediction
problems.example: Right-sizing cloud spend dynamically; autoscaling policies that minimize cost without SLA violations.

nodes.uvt: Cloud Computing elective; AWS Academy partnership at UVT; Docker/K8s practical track.
nodes.uvtRO: Opțional Cloud Computing; parteneriat AWS Academy la UVT; pistă practică Docker/K8s.

nodes.label:
High-Performance
Computing
nodes.taglineRO: Calcul paralel și supercalculatoare

problems.title: Exascale programming models
problems.example: MPI+OpenMP vs PGAS vs task-based models (HPX, Legion) — no consensus model for post-petascale systems.

problems.title: Floating-point reproducibility
problems.example: Non-determinism across MPI ranks and GPU threads makes scientific reproducibility a persistent challenge.

nodes.uvt: Parallel and Distributed Computing course with MPI and OpenMP labs at FMI-UVT.
nodes.uvtRO: Curs de Calcul Paralel și Distribuit cu laboratoare MPI și OpenMP la FMI-UVT.

nodes.label:
Computer
Graphics & Vis.
nodes.tagline: Rendering, modeling, and visual data analysis
nodes.taglineRO: Randare, modelare și analiză vizuală a datelor

problems.title: Real-time path tracing
problems.example: NVIDIA RTX hardware ray tracing (2018) made interactive path tracing feasible at 60+ fps in modern games.

problems.title: Neural radiance fields vs. Gaussian splatting
problems.example: NeRF → 3D Gaussian Splatting — quality vs. editability vs. speed tradeoffs remain unsettled.

problems.title: Editable 3D scene reconstruction
problems.example: Reconstructing a fully editable, physics-consistent 3D scene from casually-captured photos is unsolved.

nodes.uvt: Grafică pe Calculator course with OpenGL and Unity labs; visualization research in scientific computing.
nodes.uvtRO: Curs Grafică pe Calculator cu laboratoare OpenGL și Unity; cercetare în vizualizare pentru calcul științific.

nodes.label:
Bioinformatics
& Comp. Biology
nodes.tagline: Algorithms and models for biological data
nodes.taglineRO: Algoritmi și modele pentru date biologice

problems.title: Protein structure prediction
problems.example: AlphaFold 2/3 solved single-chain folding with near-experimental accuracy; protein-protein binding prediction remains open.

problems.title: Single-cell multi-omics integration
problems.example: Combining transcriptomics, proteomics, and epigenomics at single-cell resolution — alignment and batch effects unsolved.

problems.title: Pangenomics scalability
problems.example: Reference graphs encoding all human genetic variation — graph alignment algorithms do not yet scale to full populations.

nodes.uvt: Interdisciplinary master track with UVT Faculty of Biology; bioinformatics courses and research projects.
nodes.uvtRO: Traseu master interdisciplinar cu Facultatea de Biologie UVT; cursuri și proiecte de cercetare în bioinformatică.

nodes.label:
FMI-UVT
Faculty
nodes.tagline: Faculty of Mathematics & Computer Science — West University of Timișoara
nodes.taglineRO: Facultatea de Matematică și Informatică — Universitatea de Vest din Timișoara

problems.title: Bridging research and local industry
problems.example: Collaboration with Timișoara tech cluster (Continental, Flextronics, Hella) — formalizing research transfer is ongoing.

problems.title: International program growth
problems.example: English-track bachelor programs aim to attract EU Erasmus and fee-paying students; administrative barriers remain.

nodes.uvt: Central hub of CS education and research at UVT. Offers bachelor, master, and PhD programs in Romanian and English.
nodes.uvtRO: Nod central al educației și cercetării informatice la UVT. Oferă programe de licență, master și doctorat în română și engleză.

nodes.label:
Bachelor CS
(Romanian)
nodes.taglineRO: Program de licență 3 ani Informatică, limba română

problems.title: Curriculum-industry alignment lag
problems.example: New tools (LLMs, cloud-native, Rust) take ~2 years to enter official syllabi due to accreditation processes.

nodes.uvt: 240 ECTS, 3 years. Covers all ACM/IEEE core CS areas plus required mathematics (calculus, linear algebra, statistics).
nodes.uvtRO: 240 ECTS, 3 ani. Acoperă toate domeniile de bază CS (ACM/IEEE) plus matematică obligatorie (analiză, algebră, statistică).

nodes.label:
Bachelor CS
(English)
nodes.taglineRO: Program de licență 3 ani Informatică, limba engleză

problems.title: International student retention
problems.example: High first-year dropout rate for non-native English speakers without strong math background.

nodes.uvt: 240 ECTS, 3 years, fully in English. Targets Erasmus, international, and bilingual Romanian students.
nodes.uvtRO: 240 ECTS, 3 ani, complet în engleză. Vizează studenți Erasmus, internaționali și români bilingvi.

nodes.label:
Master CS
Programs
nodes.taglineRO: Programe de master specializate de 2 ani (RO & EN)

problems.title: Research vs. professional track balance
problems.example: Master theses range from novel research contributions to applied projects — quality standardization is difficult.

nodes.uvt: Active programs: AI & Machine Learning, Software Engineering, Distributed Systems, Bioinformatics (RO and EN tracks).
nodes.uvtRO: Programe active: IA & Machine Learning, Inginerie Software, Sisteme Distribuite, Bioinformatică (trasee RO și EN).

nodes.label:
PhD Program
CS @ UVT
nodes.tagline: Research doctorate in computer science at UVT
nodes.taglineRO: Doctorat în cercetare informatică la UVT

problems.title: Research funding sustainability
problems.example: Competitive grants via UEFISCDI and Horizon Europe; maintaining continuity between project cycles is challenging.

nodes.uvt: PhD school at FMI-UVT; active research areas: AI/ML, distributed systems, formal methods, bioinformatics.
nodes.uvtRO: Școala doctorală FMI-UVT; domenii de cercetare active: IA/ML, sisteme distribuite, metode formale, bioinformatică.

nodes.label:
SYNASC
Conference
nodes.tagline: Symbolic & Numeric Algorithms for Scientific Computing — IEEE proceedings
nodes.taglineRO: Algoritmi Simbolici și Numerici pentru Calcul Științific — proceedings IEEE
people: Co-organized by FMI-UVT and RISC Linz (Austria)
nodes.uvt: Annual international conference co-organized by FMI-UVT since 1999. Covers symbolic computation, AI, distributed systems, and numerical methods.
nodes.uvtRO: Conferință internațională anuală co-organizată de FMI-UVT din 1999. Acoperă calcul simbolic, IA, sisteme distribuite și metode numerice.
